wd_admissions_pipeline.name: campus_location
wd_admissions_pipeline.description: Specific physical campus operational zone (Waco, North Texas, Williamson County).

wd_admissions_pipeline.name: program_of_study
wd_admissions_pipeline.description: Technical trade pathway (Cybersecurity, Welding, Diesel Equipment, Automation).

wd_admissions_pipeline.name: application_status
wd_admissions_pipeline.description: Current pipeline lifecycle stage (Applied, Admitted, Matriculated).

wd_financial_aid_bps.name: student_id
wd_financial_aid_bps.description: Foreign key connecting to the admissions pipeline.

wd_financial_aid_bps.name: bp_step_status
wd_financial_aid_bps.description: Operational state of the step (Approved, Awaiting Action, Exception).

wd_financial_aid_bps.name: elapsed_time_hours
wd_financial_aid_bps.description: Total processing time the record has remained at the current step.

wd_financial_aid_bps.name: isir_verification_required
wd_financial_aid_bps.description: Binary indicator for federal verification profiles (1 = True, 0 = False).
